reasoning: Multiple authoritative sources (Reuters, The Hindu, Prothom Alo, as well as an official X post from Starlink) confirm that SpaceX officially launched its Starlink satellite internet service in Bangladesh on May 20, 2025. Tech entrepreneurs have confirmed being able to order Starlink devices directly from the company's website in Bangladesh, and pricing details are publicly available. Since the launch explicitly declared the service "now available in Bangladesh" and allowed users to purchase equipment, there is no serious doubt that the Starlink Availability Map displayed somewhere in Bangladesh as "Available" before the July 1, 2025 resolution date.
